properties.verseOrder: V1 V2 V3 V4 C5 V6 V7 C5

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: She was down on her knees She would never get free Her accusers had stones in their hands They turned to Jesus just to see what he'd say But the Lord just wrote in the sand

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: They all walked away when they heard him say Let the sin free cast the first stone With tears on her face, all her sins were erased She stood in a moment of grace

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: Now the thief on the cross knew that his life was lost He must pay for the crimes of his past He had done nothing right He would sure lose his fight His time was running out fast

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: In desperation he cried To the Lord at his side Remember me when you reach Heaven's gate Jesus forgave and all his sins were erased And he died in a moment of grace.

verse.name: C5
verse.lines: A moment of grace, Undeserved favor Unspeakable joy My soul found an anchor Such unmerited love And mercy that swept my soul away He called my name, and everything changed In a moment of grace

verse.name: V6
verse.lines: I've been counted out by the self-righteous crowd Who would say that I'm not worthy to live They say, "You've drifted too far You're so stuck in sin's mire You need a miracle that only God can give"

verse.name: V7
verse.lines: But Jesus passed by and with his reply He said, "I choose you… just live for me today And Jesus forgave… all my sin was erased And I stood in a moment of grace
